# Rozare

> Rozare is an AI-powered online marketplace where buyers discover products from independent sellers and brands, while sellers manage storefronts through dashboard tools, AI chat, and WhatsApp.

Rozare connects shoppers with seller-run storefronts across electronics, fashion, home decor, beauty, jewelry and more. Sellers get a custom subdomain storefront, AI-assisted tools, WhatsApp store management, coupons, shipping settings, and analytics. Shoppers get product discovery, reviews, trust signals, secure checkout, multi-currency browsing, and seller-managed shipping.

## Pages

- [Home](https://rozare.com/): Marketplace homepage with trending products and curated picks.
- [Marketplace](https://rozare.com/marketplace): Browse products from independent sellers and brands.
- [Trusted Stores](https://rozare.com/marketplace/trusted): Top-rated and most-followed seller stores.
- [Become a Seller](https://rozare.com/become-seller): Start a Rozare store with a 15-day free trial, then choose Starter or Elite to keep selling.
- [About](https://rozare.com/about): Our mission and how Rozare works.
- [Contact](https://rozare.com/contact): Reach the Rozare team.
- [FAQ](https://rozare.com/faq): Common questions about buying, selling, payments, and shipping.
- [Track Order](https://rozare.com/track-order): Look up the status of an existing order.

## Docs

- [Documentation](https://docs.rozare.com/): Seller and buyer documentation, guides, and platform reference.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](https://rozare.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://rozare.com/privacy)
